action.item: CREATE TABLE ecoClassify_TilingOptions(TilingOptionsId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ScenarioId INTEGER, AutoTiling BOOLEAN, NumTilesX INTEGER, NumTilesY INTEGER)

CREATE TABLE ecoClassify_TargetClassOptions(TargetClassOptionsId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ScenarioId INTEGER, useTargetClass BOOLEAN, targetClassValue INTEGER, backgroundValues TEXT, ignoreValues TEXT, targetClassLabel TEXT)

CREATE TABLE ecoClassify_SummaryOutput(SummaryOutputId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ScenarioId INTEGER, Timestep INTEGER, TargetClassValue INTEGER, TargetClassLabel TEXT, PredictionType TEXT, PredictedPixels INTEGER, PredictedArea DOUBLE, MeanProbability DOUBLE, MedianProbability DOUBLE, MinProbability DOUBLE, MaxProbability DOUBLE)

CREATE TABLE ecoClassify_SummaryOutputChart(SummaryOutputChartId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ScenarioId INTEGER, Timestep INTEGER, TargetClassValue INTEGER, TargetClassLabel TEXT, PredictionType TEXT, PredictedPixels INTEGER, PredictedArea DOUBLE, MeanProbability DOUBLE, MedianProbability DOUBLE, MinProbability DOUBLE, MaxProbability DOUBLE)

CREATE TABLE ecoClassify_ModelMetricsByClass(ModelMetricsByClassId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ScenarioId INTEGER, TargetClassValue INTEGER, TargetClassLabel TEXT, Accuracy DOUBLE, Precision DOUBLE, Recall DOUBLE, Specificity DOUBLE, F1 DOUBLE, AUC DOUBLE)
ALTER TABLE ecoClassify_Terminology ADD COLUMN redBand TEXT
ALTER TABLE ecoClassify_Terminology ADD COLUMN greenBand TEXT
ALTER TABLE ecoClassify_Terminology ADD COLUMN blueBand TEXT
ALTER TABLE ecoClassify_Terminology ADD COLUMN nirBand TEXT
ALTER TABLE ecoClassify_Terminology ADD COLUMN swirBand TEXT
